Open Book — Project Plan
KeHE Cares 2026–27 Partnership
Kickoff: April 14, 2026
Target close: April 30, 2027
Deliverable Tracker
●
2025 Impact Report
○
Impact Video Reskin
○

Brand Guidelines + Training
Project Overview
Workstream Status Timeline Notes
New Scope Start-Up + Alignment Complete Apr 2026
2025 Impact Report In Progress Apr – Jun Theme development, content gathering, refreshed data and stories, and design and build of the site with the same proven structure as the 2024 report.
Impact Video Reskin Upcoming Apr – Jun Reskin of existing impact video with updated pillar messaging. (No new footage or VO.)
Owners & Donors Video Upcoming May – Jul A compelling 4-5 minute "in their words" video capturing what it means to be an owner-donor at KeHE. Includes direct-address interview footage, motion graphics, and creative packaging. (TOB provides creative direction, scripting, storyboarding, editing, design, and post-production. Interview filming/capture to be coordinated separately with KCF and KeHE marketing.)
Storytelling Upcoming Jul – Aug Develop ongoing storytelling program focused on helping Owners & Donors understand KeHE serving and giving impact. (Building upon interviews and interactions from previous engagement.)
Website 1.5 Updates Upcoming Jun – Aug Update current site structure and messaging to reflect Serve/Invest/Equip pillars and donor prominence. No new platform implementation, redesign, or custom development.
Brand Guidelines + Training Upcoming Apr – May Finalize + deliver KCF brand guidelines document. Team training session on brand usage and consistency.
Monthly Meetings + Status Updates In Progress Apr – Apr 2027
Conclusion Steps Upcoming –
Key Milestones + Sign-Off Dates
Target Date Milestone Workstream Status Notes
